original_snippet_context: Discussion about the denominations of banknotes to be issued by the Caixa de Conversão.
relevant_quote: Das notas a emitir pela Caixa de Conversão muito se tem fallado...
justification: This excerpt introduces a discussion about the practical aspects of the banknotes to be issued by the Caixa, such as their denominations and units.  It doesn't express an opinion on the Caixa itself or its economic impact, focusing on operational details.
